title: paepalanthus stellatus
intro: Paepalanthus stellatus, also known as the star Paepalanthus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Eriocaulaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Paepalanthus stellatus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and treat digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Paepalanthus stellatus can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or decocting the roots in boiling water to create a tea or infusion for medicinal use.
